codeReview.summary: Fix review passed. The prior blocking gap (missing immutable same-SHA remote check-run proof for required contexts) is resolved by updating tests/artifacts/confidence-gates-final-evidence.json to include explicit required-context cross-validation with per-context immutable run IDs/URLs, completed/success outcomes, and mapping integrity booleans tied to the asserted revision 560ddbcdc320d48a14e1b195bf3d50439c4c8c5c.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ci-gate-worker skill procedure remains slightly underspecified for final evidence work: it requires collecting required-check readiness evidence, but does not explicitly require immutable same-SHA check-run IDs/URLs and required-context-to-run cross-validation in the artifact. This under-specification is consistent with the original miss that this fix corrected.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/ci-gate-worker/SKILL.md:28 says 'collect evidence for required check readiness' generically; the failed prior review (.factory/validation/confidence-gates/scrutiny/reviews/confidence-final-required-check-evidence-and-stability.json) documented the missing immutable same-SHA proof; this fix then added explicit mapping fields in tests/artifacts/confidence-gates-final-evidence.json (requiredContextCrossValidation, branchProtectionAssessment.requiredContextMappingVerified).

summary: Pass: reviewing both the original failed feature and the fix shows the blocking requirement is now satisfied. The evidence artifact now audibly binds branch-protection required contexts (lint/vitest/pytest/playwright) to immutable same-SHA remote check-run identities with explicit cross-validation and no fail-closed regression in scope.
